summary: LPC has kept this review comfortably ahead of its 85% target every year, consistently in the high 90s. The agency credits its dedicated four-person Archaeology Department along with revised archaeology review guidelines it issued to make the process more efficient, transparent, and consistent for applicants.

sources.label: LPC, "LPC Releases New Guidelines For Archaeological Work In NYC"

oneLiner: staying comfortably ahead of target, thanks to a dedicated archaeology team and streamlined review guidelines
